creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
The last of those two fallouts reported by Antoine in comment #31 should be fixed, I hope.

I shall concur to what Tobias had said in comment #28: Neel, you don't just go ahead and make a commit after the first wave, i.e., before all the fallout from the exp-run had been addressed.

Tobias had explained it better than I could, so I'll just stop here, but please bear this in mind next time you'd want to update some important port.
